meta.description: Representative stranded-generation and AI-load entries for the KOMPOSOS-WESyS AI-energy matching engine. These are NOT a live queue export. Each entry is calibrated to real 2026 figures and announced deals so the engine's behavior is realistic; swap this file for an ISO/RTO queue + EIA-860 export for a real audit.
sources: LBNL 'Queued Up' (emp.lbl.gov/queues), data through end of 2025, updated May 2026
Latitude Media: ERCOT large-load queue quadrupled to 226 GW (2025)
IEEE Spectrum / Introl: Amazon-Susquehanna 300 MW behind-the-meter (+180 MW requested); Microsoft-Three Mile Island 835 MW restart
CNBC (2025-10-17): data-center energy mix ~gas 40% / renewables 24% / coal 15%
Chevron + GE Vernova: up to 4 GW behind-the-meter gas for data centers (18-24 month timelines)

schema.generator: name, region, nameplate_mw, utilization (0..1 used today), kind, interconnected (bool), note, source
schema.load: name, region, needed_mw, flexibility (0..1 interruptible share), queue_years, note, source

generators.name: Curtailed Solar+Storage (West TX)
generators.note: ERCOT solar+storage is ~77% of the queue and routinely curtailed; large headroom most hours.

generators.name: Underused Gas Peaker Fleet
generators.note: Peakers run at low capacity factor; firm headroom available for co-located load.

generators.name: Aging Coal Unit (low capacity factor)
generators.note: Coal ~15% of data-center mix and declining; existing interconnection is the asset.

generators.name: Nuclear Behind-the-Meter Carve-out (Susquehanna-style)
generators.note: Models the Amazon-Susquehanna 300 MW behind-the-meter carve-out (+180 MW requested).

generators.name: Seasonal Spilled Hydro
generators.note: Seasonal spill = variable headroom; good for flexible load, not firm 24/7 load.

generators.name: Curtailed Wind
generators.note: SPP is wind-rich with frequent curtailment; variable, cannot firm a 24/7 load alone.

loads.name: Hyperscaler Training Campus
loads.note: Training is largely interruptible; ERCOT large-load queue is 226 GW (4x in one year).

loads.name: Inference Cluster (24/7)
loads.note: Near-firm serving load; needs firm generation, not variable-only co-location.

loads.name: Burst Training Pod
loads.note: Highly interruptible; ideal partner for curtailed renewables.

loads.name: AI Campus (Susquehanna-style)
loads.note: Sized to the Amazon-Susquehanna 300+180 MW behind-the-meter campus.

loads.name: Sovereign AI Build
loads.note: Moderate flexibility; long expected interconnection wait in MISO.

loads.name: Research Supercompute (24/7)
loads.note: Firm 24/7 load in a wind-only stranded region: an honest non-match (needs firming/transmission).
